violations.text: The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025

The door to the outside, located in the stock room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the candy shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025
